title: Retrieval-Free Knowledge-Grounded Dialogue Response Generation with Adapters

key_components: Adapters inserted upon GPT-2 layers as knowledge experts
Topic model that assigns weights over knowledge experts
methodology.architecture: Adapters enhance response generation with help from topic model

problem_statement.traditional_approach: Knowledge Retrieval (from large corpus) → Knowledge Selection (most relevant) → Knowledge-augmented Generation
limitations: Inefficient due to knowledge retrieval over large corpora
High memory resource consumption for storing knowledge corpus
Additional processing time for retrieval and selection
Significant computation overhead from adding knowledge as context

key_innovations: Using adapters as knowledge experts within the base language model
Leveraging implicit knowledge in pre-trained language models

results.efficiency_improvement: The retrieval-free approach addresses efficiency concerns of traditional KGD systems
results.context: Large pre-trained language models have shown capability to carry implicit knowledge

challenges: One-to-many issue between inputs and possible outputs in open-domain chit-chat
